steps.name: $("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Age')] and th[contains(text(), 'Sex')]]/ancestor::table/parent::div//button[contains(@class, 'status')]") should not have(text "Status: not pushed")

parameters.name: user
parameters.value: User(id=null, firstName=Zenaida, lastName=Gutkowski, age=67, sex=FEMALE, money=595886.95)

steps.name: Проверка успешности создания пользователя и получение его id
$("By.xpath: //*[th[contains(text(), 'Age')] and th[contains(text(), 'Sex')]]/ancestor::table/parent::div/div/button[3]") should not be(empty: attribute value="" and exact text "")
